title: Type conversion BIFs and process registry
purpose: gleam_erlang_ffi imports type conversion BIFs and process registry BIFs. This brief implements them and adds a process name registry to SharedState.
task: Implement type conversion BIFs, process registry (register/unregister/whereis), and demonitor/2.
boundaries: This brief SHALL NOT implement register/2 for ports
This brief SHALL NOT implement binary_to_term/1 or term_to_binary/1
This brief SHALL NOT implement binary_to_integer or binary_to_float

requirements.title: Type conversion BIFs
requirements.spec: Implement atom_to_binary/2, binary_to_existing_atom/1, binary_to_list/1, list_to_binary/1, map_get/2.

requirements.title: Process registry BIFs
requirements.spec: Implement register/2, unregister/1, whereis/1 backed by HashMap<Atom, u64> on SharedState via RegistryFacility trait.

requirements.title: erlang:demonitor/2
requirements.spec: demonitor/2 accepts (Ref, Options) list. Support [flush] and [info] options. Empty list behaves like demonitor/1.
acceptance: demonitor(Ref, [flush]) removes monitor and flushes DOWN
